name: Peanut Butter Playdough (Made to Be Eaten!)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup (to 1 1/2 cups) nonfat dry milk powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Mix until well combined and smooth.
3. If the playdough is too sticky, add more nonfat dry milk powder, one tablespoon at a time, until desired consistency is reached.
- Add 1/2 cup (to 1 1/2 cups) of nonfat dry milk powder as needed to keep it from being sticky.
